Source code for killMS.Parset.MyOptParse

#!/usr/bin/env python
"""

along with this program; if not, write to the Free Software

#!/usr/bin/env python
from __future__ import absolute_import
from __future__ import division
from __future__ import print_function
import collections
import optparse as OptParse # ok
from . import PrintOptParse # ok
from . import ReadCFG       # ok

from . import ClassPrint
from killMS.Other import ModColor # ok
from killMS.Other.logo import report_version # ok
#global Parset
#Parset=ReadCFG.Parset("/media/tasse/data/DDFacet/Parset/DefaultParset.cfg")
#D=Parset.DicoPars 



[docs]
class MyOptParse():
    '''
    Customised killMS wrapper for OptParse.
    '''
    def __init__(self,
                 usage='Usage: %prog --ms=somename.MS <options>',
                 version=report_version(),
                 description="""Questions and suggestions: cyril.tasse@obspm.fr""",
                 DefaultDict=None):
        '''
        Docstring for __init__
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        :param usage: Example terminal invocation of the program
        :param version: version of the program
        :param description: Helpful contact message for feedback
        :param DefaultDict: Default dictionary
        '''
        self.opt = OptParse.OptionParser(usage=usage,version=version,description=description)
        self.DefaultDict=DefaultDict
        self.CurrentGroup=None
        self.DicoGroupDesc=collections.OrderedDict()
        # remember parameter types so we can generate a schema, if needed
        self.parameter_types = collections.OrderedDict()



[docs]
    def OptionGroup(self,
                    Name,
                    key=None) -> None:
        '''
        Function which either finalises or initialises a DicoGroupDesc
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        :param Name: Name of the OptionGroup
        :param key: optionally, set CurrentGroupKey
        '''
        if self.CurrentGroup!=None:
            self.Finalise()
        self.CurrentGroup = OptParse.OptionGroup(self.opt, Name)
        self.CurrentGroupKey=key
        self.DicoGroupDesc[key]=Name






[docs]
    def GiveOptionObject(self) -> object:
        '''
        TODO: reads, sets and returns the Options for a given Object
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        '''
        DC=self.GiveDicoConfig()
        class Object(object):
            pass

        options=Object()
        for Field in DC.keys():
            D=DC[Field]
            for key in D.keys():
                setattr(options, key, D[key])
        return options





[docs]
    def add_option(self,
                   Name='Mode',
                   help='Default %default',
                   type="str",
                   default=None) -> None:
        '''
        Wrapper for optparse add_option.  
        Invokes the DefaultDict if provided and no default given in this invocation.
        Useful for batch defaulting.
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        :param Name: Name of the option
        :param help: Help message for the option
        :param type: Type of the option's value
        :param default: Default value for the option
        '''
        if default==None:
            default=self.DefaultDict[self.CurrentGroupKey][Name]
        
        self.CurrentGroup.add_option('--%s'%Name,
                                     help=help,
                                     type=type,
                                     default=default,
                                     dest=self.GiveKeyDest(self.CurrentGroupKey,Name))
        self.parameter_types[Name] = type





[docs]
    def GiveKeyDest(self,
                    GroupKey,
                    Name) -> str:
        '''
        Automated "Groupkey_Name" key builder for OptParse
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        :param GroupKey: Key of the group being invoked
        :param Name: Name of the option
        '''
        return "_".join([GroupKey,Name])





[docs]
    def GiveKeysOut(self,KeyDest) -> str:
        '''
        Split a KeyDest into GroupKey, Name
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        :param KeyDest: Groupkey_Name key string
        '''
        return KeyDest.split("_")





[docs]
    def Finalise(self) -> None:
        '''
        Wrapper to opt.add_option_group
        Invoked once the CurrentGroup is fully initialised.

        :param self: MyOptParse
        '''
        self.opt.add_option_group(self.CurrentGroup)





[docs]
    def ReadInput(self) -> None:
        '''
        Wrapper for opt.parse_args()
        sets self.options and self.arguments
        invokes GiveDicoConfig function, which it sets as the DefaultDict
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        '''
        self.options, self.arguments = self.opt.parse_args()
        # TODO: can two lines below be concatenated?
        self.GiveDicoConfig()
        self.DicoConfig=self.DefaultDict


        


[docs]
    def GiveDicoConfig(self) -> dict:
        '''
        Function to build the full DefaultDict out of self.options
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        '''
        DicoDest=vars(self.options)
        for key in DicoDest.keys():
            GroupName,Name=self.GiveKeysOut(key)
            val=DicoDest[key]
            if type(val)==str:
                val=ReadCFG.FormatValue(val)
            self.DefaultDict[GroupName][Name]=val

        return self.DefaultDict





[docs]
    def ToParset(self,
                 ParsetName) -> None:
        '''
        Function to write current options to parset file
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        :param ParsetName: Filename for the parset in which to write current options
        '''
        Dico=self.GiveDicoConfig()
        f=open(ParsetName,"w")
        for MainKey in Dico.keys():
            f.write('[%s]\n'%MainKey)
            D=Dico[MainKey]
            for SubKey in D.keys():
                f.write('%s = %s \n'%(SubKey,str(D[SubKey])))
            f.write('\n')
        f.close()





[docs]
    def Print(self,
              RejectGroup=[]) -> None:
        '''
        Function to print current options to terminal
        
        :param self: MyOptParse
        :param RejectGroup: Array of groups to skip when printing
        '''
        P=ClassPrint.ClassPrint(HW=50)
        print(ModColor.Str(" Selected Options:"))
    
        for Group,V in self.DefaultDict.items():
            Skip=False
            for Name in RejectGroup:
                if Name in Group:
                    Skip=True
            if Skip: continue
            try:
                GroupTitle=self.DicoGroupDesc[Group]
            except:
                GroupTitle=Group
            print(ModColor.Str(GroupTitle,col="green"))
    
            option_list=self.DefaultDict[Group]
            for oname in option_list:
                V=self.DefaultDict[Group][oname]
                
                if True:#V!="":
                    if V=="": V="''"
                    P.Print(oname,V)
            print()









[docs]
def test():
    '''
    Unit test for MyOptParse.
    TODO: harmonise with other pytest modules.
    '''
    OP=MyOptParse()
    
    OP.OptionGroup("* Data","VisData")
    OP.add_option('MSName',help='Input MS')
    OP.add_option('ColName')
    OP.Finalise()
    OP.ReadInput()
    Dico=OP.GiveDicoConfig()
    OP.Print()
    
    return OP.DefaultDict


    

if __name__=="__main__":
    test()
